config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. I do not think society’s interests should automatically come before individual rights, because that can be used to excuse abuse and silence people who are already vulnerable. In my view, a fair society protects individual rights first, then limits them only when there is a clear and necessary public good. From my perspective, collective harmony matters, but it should not come at the cost of basic freedom and dignity.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus selalu didahulukan di atas hak individu. Sebagai orang dari Amerika Serikat, saya sangat curiga pada klaim “demi kepentingan umum” karena itu sering dipakai untuk membenarkan penyalahgunaan kekuasaan, sensor, dan perlakuan tidak adil terhadap minoritas. Menurut saya, masyarakat yang sehat justru dibangun dengan melindungi hak individu terlebih dahulu, lalu membatasi hak itu hanya jika ada alasan yang benar-benar kuat, jelas, dan proporsional. Kalau tidak, “kepentingan masyarakat” bisa menjadi alasan yang terlalu mudah untuk menginjak kebebasan dan martabat orang.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not believe society’s interests should take priority over individual rights as a general rule. In Indonesia, I have seen how “for the public good” can be used to pressure people to stay quiet, especially when the people with power decide what counts as good for everyone. Collective harmony matters, but if individual rights are treated as secondary, minorities and ordinary citizens are the first to lose protection. The right balance is to protect individual dignity first and only restrict it when the public need is truly clear, limited, and accountable.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus diprioritaskan di atas hak individu sebagai prinsip umum. Dari perspektif saya sebagai orang Amerika Serikat, sejarah kami penuh dengan contoh bagaimana alasan “demi kebaikan bersama” dipakai untuk membenarkan sensor, diskriminasi, dan penyalahgunaan kekuasaan, jadi saya tidak percaya pada klaim itu tanpa batas yang sangat ketat. Hak individu harus menjadi titik awal, karena justru di situlah warga, terutama minoritas, mendapat perlindungan dari mayoritas yang terlalu mudah mengabaikan mereka. Kepentingan publik memang penting, tetapi hanya boleh membatasi hak bila ada kebutuhan yang jelas, sempit, dan benar-benar dapat dipertanggungjawabkan.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The interests of society should not automatically outrank individual rights, because in Indonesia I have seen how “for the common good” can be used to pressure people into silence and make unfair power look legitimate. I do think public needs matter, but they should only limit rights when the reason is clear, narrow, and accountable, not just because a majority says so. If we put society first by default, minorities and ordinary people lose protection fastest. A healthy society is one that defends individual dignity first and only asks for limits when there is a real and proven public necessity.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus diprioritaskan di atas hak individu sebagai prinsip umum. Dari sudut pandang saya sebagai orang Amerika Serikat, alasan “demi kebaikan bersama” terlalu sering dipakai untuk membenarkan sensor, diskriminasi, dan penyalahgunaan kekuasaan, jadi saya tidak mau memberi itu status yang lebih tinggi daripada hak dasar. Justru hak individu, terutama bagi minoritas, harus menjadi titik awal karena di situlah warga terlindungi dari mayoritas yang mungkin merasa tahu apa yang terbaik. Kepentingan publik memang penting, tetapi hanya layak membatasi hak jika kebutuhannya jelas, sempit, dan benar-benar bisa dipertanggungjawabkan.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
